content: Just as inter-service connectivity testing validates that all microservices can reliably exchange data and behave correctly under load before a service mesh goes to production, we can adapt the standardized testing frameworks from microservices to validate end-to-end connectivity and context integrity for AI systems built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This gives AI developers a pre-production validation approach to catch broken context routing, degraded context throughput, and inconsistent cross-system context sharing before they impact end-users.
